title: Multi-omics profiling reveals MAGEL2-driven defects in human corticogenesis shared across Prader-Willi and Schaaf-Yang syndromes.
abstract: Disruption of cortical developmental programs underlies neurodevelopmental disorders such as Schaaf-Yang and Prader-Willi syndromes. Multi-omics profiling reveals MAGEL2-driven defects in corticogenesis shared across both conditions.
